name: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC)
summary: Day 80 (Monday). **A5 IRGC IN TASNIM MOJTABA-BRIEFING NARRATIVE** — Major General Ali Abdollahi (commander of Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters — the supreme command HQ over the army, IRGC, police, intelligence, border forces, defense ministry, Basij militia) reportedly briefed Mojtaba on armed-forces readiness (CLAIMED — Tasnim state-affiliated; report ABOUT Mojtaba, not BY/OF Mojtaba). Second state-media positioning act in three days; Middle East Forum frames as deliberate state-media campaign to reinforce Mojtaba's leadership narrative without producing him. **A4 HOUTHI RED SEA DAY 7 OF 7 NEGATIVE-SPACE WINDOW CLOSES UNTRIPPED** — proxy network operating well below historic kinetic ceiling; coordinated quietism with TASS/Xinhua + Mojtaba silence + Hezbollah calibrated attrition. **IRGC OPERATIONAL POSTURE: Kharg air-defense reinforcement (REPORTED — single-source US intel chain via NYT) carries forward as the active posture** — predictable response to publicly-discussed US ground operation. IRGC has NOT publicly addressed the Kharg air-defense reinforcement through Monday morning IST. **PRIOR (May 17): IRGC OPERATIONAL POSTURE TRANSITIONING FROM TEHRAN DRILL TO KHARG REINFORCEMENT (REPORTED).** Per NYT (Friday May 15 / Saturday May 16, citing US intelligence reporting), **Iran has laid traps and moved additional military personnel and air defenses to Kharg Island in recent weeks** in preparation for possible US ground operation. Kharg sits 20 miles off the Iranian mainland and handles up to 90% of Iran's oil exports — IRGC Navy and IRGC Aerospace (air-defense) responsibility. Air-defense reinforcement is the predictable response to a publicly-discussed ground operation. **The 'Martyred Commander / Labbayk Ya Khamenei' Tehran-corps drill (closed May 15 Day 5/5) was the rehearsal; the Kharg reinforcement is operational application.** Single-source chain (NYT citing US intel) limits verification to REPORTED — but operational signature visible at known location with prior satellite coverage. **A5 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 10 SILENCE** — IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than Mojtaba continues to be the cleanest institutional tell of the cycle on Mojtaba's constrained authority. **No new IRGC drill announced as of May 17; the Martyred Commander drill ended May 15.** The Artesh-Akraminia 'surprising options' rhetoric from May 14-15 carries forward — coordinated kinetic-readiness messaging across BOTH Iranian military pillars persists. **IRGC has NOT publicly addressed the Kharg air-defense reinforcement** — consistent with operational opacity rather than denial. **PRIOR (May 15):** Day 77. A7 IRGC 'MARTYRED COMMANDER' / 'LABBAYK YA KHAMENEI' COMBAT EXERCISE CLOSED DAY 5/5 — HASSANZADEH STATEMENT THAT ALL OBJECTIVES ACHIEVED** (CONFIRMED — Mehr News + News.az + Islam Times + Pars Today). Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh, commander IRGC Great Tehran Corps, confirmed all pre-rehearsed scenarios, individual combat techniques, and team tactics were executed and evaluated during the 5-day drill involving rapid reaction forces, special forces, IRGC and Basij commando units. **The drill's invocation of the deceased Ali Khamenei (codename 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei') rather than the new Supreme Leader Mojtaba is the institutional tell: the IRGC is publicly leaning on the late patriarch's legacy rather than the constrained successor.** The IRGC also ran a parallel 'Anti-Heliborne War Game' — a counter-Special-Operations-insertion drill that maps directly to the kind of US ground-raid posture that would follow if Sledgehammer were ordered. **The drill's completion today coincides with the closing of Trump's 1-week clock window and the ongoing Washington Israel-Lebanon talks — kinetic preparation reaching its scheduled completion exactly as the diplomatic track also reaches its scheduled checkpoints.** **B5 IRANIAN ARMY (ARTESH) SPOKESPERSON BRIG. GEN. AKRAMINIA 'SURPRISING OPTIONS' RHETORIC** in parallel IRNA interview is the cleanest signal yet of coordinated kinetic-readiness messaging across BOTH Iranian military pillars (Artesh + IRGC) exactly as the Trump-Xi joint statement was being issued. **A12 prior framing (carries forward): IRGC encoded as preparation/signaling, NOT actual kinetic operation** — per CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE FLAG 8, do not promote to 'Iran kinetic restart.' Multi-channel Iranian state-media synchronisation continues: IRNA + Tasnim + Mehr News + Press TV + Islam Times + Pars Today all carried the drill conclusion as top-of-coverage with codename invoking deceased Ali rather than supposedly-active Mojtaba. (CONFIRMED ACTION — Mehr News primary, Press TV, Tasnim, Islam Times, Pars Today, WION, News.az). Mohammad Rasulullah Division (Tehran Corps) under Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh confirmed exercise purpose: 'enhancing combat ability to counter any hostile move by the American-Zionist enemy.' **Codename invokes the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father), NOT supposedly-active new Supreme Leader = institutional imagery leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained**. Tasnim simultaneously (May 13) ran separate piece 'IRGC Division Holds Anti-Heliborne War Game' — Special Operations counter-insertion drill suggests Iran preparing for US ground-raid posture that could follow if Pentagon's contingency-named 'Operation Sledgehammer' (B2 NBC News May 12) is ordered. **Cleanest single operational confirmation that Iran's military is preparing for a restart scenario, even as political track continues.** Both Iran (IRGC drill) and US (Sledgehammer naming) are signalling kinetic preparedness around Trump-return decision window May 15-20. Multi-channel Iranian state-media synchronisation: IRNA + Tasnim + Mehr News + Press TV + Islam Times + Pars Today all running the drill as top-of-coverage. **IRGC encoded as preparation/signaling, NOT actual kinetic operation** — per CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE FLAG 8, do not promote to 'Iran kinetic restart.' PRIOR (May 7): **IRGC FACTIONAL HARDLINE-LEVERAGE TRACK CONTINUES IN PARALLEL TO MOU DIPLOMACY: TASNIM (IRGC-aligned) CALLED THE 14-POINT MOU 'MORE OF A WISHLIST THAN A REALITY' MAY 6 — preserving hardline-leverage rhetoric but NOT calling for retaliation/escalation.** Press TV (IRGC-adjacent state propaganda, English audience) ran 'Project Freedom perishes in 48 hours as Trump retreats under wall of Iran's asymmetric deterrence' — triumphalist victory framing, the kind of language that historically PRECEDES acceptance of a deal because it provides rhetorical cover for the regime to claim leverage success regardless of substantive terms. Internal Iranian posture divergence is now structural: Pezeshkian/Araghchi civilian government on negotiating track (Baqaei: 'assessing,' 'lasting peace top priority') vs IRGC/Tasnim leverage track. **CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile (CBS attribution to Iranian cruise missile, IRGC has NOT claimed — itself unusual) demonstrates IRGC tactical leverage continues at operational layer despite civilian-government diplomatic-track signals.** The bifurcation between kinetic risk and political track is now structural — France's Charles de Gaulle CSG redeployment Suez→Red Sea/Gulf of Aden is the European naval response. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent (AI-generated videos confirmed by TIME) — supreme-leader vacuum is the structural reason both tracks are operating in parallel without unified executive resolution.

recent_signals.headline: **DEFENSE SYSTEMS REPORTEDLY ACTIVATED ON QESHM ISLAND IN STRAIT OF HORMUZ LATE MONDAY — IRANIAN OFFICIALS REPORTED 'UNDER CONTROL'** (REPORTED single-source narrative emerging from Trump-postponement coverage; needs second-source corroboration before tagged CONFIRMED). Qeshm is Iran's largest island in the Gulf, sits at the throat of the Strait of Hormuz, hosts IRGC Navy facilities and surface-to-air missile batteries. Any 'activation' of its defense systems is a CONFIRMED operational-readiness posture against potential US/Israeli strikes through the Hormuz corridor. **Consistent with Trump's framing that the postponement is conditional** ('remain prepared for a full-scale assault at a moment's notice') — Iran is publicly reading the postponement as conditional too, and behaving accordingly. The 'under control' language is calibrated to communicate readiness without claiming engagement. **IRGC selective-transit posture on Hormuz remains operative**: Iran is doubling down on the selective-control posture rather than softening into a Hormuz reopening even with the postponement. The graph treats this as a small but operationally real upgrade of the 'Strait of Hormuz remains under Iranian selective control' status (currently active).
sources: Single primary-narrative source surfaced in Trump-postponement coverage
recent_signals.verification: Qeshm Island activation = REPORTED (single-source); operational signature can be cross-checked over coming days; IRGC selective-transit posture = CONFIRMED ongoing structural reality.

recent_signals.headline: **A12 IRGC LAUNCHED 5-DAY 'MARTYRED COMMANDER' / 'LABBAYK YA KHAMENEI' COMBAT EXERCISE AROUND TEHRAN (May 12-onwards)** (CONFIRMED ACTION — Mehr News primary, Press TV, Tasnim, Islam Times, Pars Today, WION, News.az). Mohammad Rasulullah Division (Tehran Corps) under Brig. Gen. Hassan Hassanzadeh: 'enhancing combat ability to counter any hostile move by the American-Zionist enemy.' **Codename invokes the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father), NOT supposedly-active new Supreme Leader = institutional imagery leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained.** Tasnim simultaneously (May 13): 'IRGC Division Holds Anti-Heliborne War Game' — Special Operations counter-insertion drill = Iran preparing for US ground-raid posture that could follow if Sledgehammer ordered (B2 NBC News May 12). Pentagon Sledgehammer naming is the structurally matched US-side preparation. Cleanest single operational confirmation that Iran's military is preparing for restart scenario even as political track continues. Multi-channel state-media synchronisation: IRNA + Tasnim + Mehr News + Press TV + Islam Times + Pars Today all running the drill as top-of-coverage. **CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE: encode as operational-signaling at conservative weight; do NOT promote to 'Iran kinetic restart' — exercise/preparation is not actual kinetic operation.**
sources: Mehr News 'IRGC holds major 5-day combat exercise around Tehran' (Iranian state primary)

recent_signals.verification: IRGC 'Martyred Commander' 5-day exercise = CONFIRMED ACTION (Iranian state primary multi-source + secondary corroborators) — operational signaling, NOT actual kinetic operation. Tasnim anti-heliborne drill = CONFIRMED ACTION (Tasnim primary).
